anchor.text: Applicants must submit documentation within 30 days.

analysis.observation: Includes a requirement ('must') and a time limit ('within 30 days').
analysis.operationalMeaning: Applicants are required to submit documentation within 30 days.

anchor.text: The agency may extend deadlines under exceptional circumstances.

analysis.observation: Includes permission or discretion ('may') and a condition ('under exceptional circumstances').
analysis.operationalMeaning: The agency is allowed to extend deadlines under exceptional circumstances.
